efficiency.notes: Direct mechanical conversion, no LLM agent used

Headers.error: P0005: Missing parens in SizeOf#BTH at line 231

SpecialFIFOF.error: P0045: Mangled function bodies at line 23

key_findings: Auto-parsing BSV with regex is unreliable for complex constructs
Direct mechanical YAML→BSV translation defeats the purpose of the compiler
Need LLM agent (ccb) for code generation from YAML descriptions
Settings.bsv (typedefs only) is a good starting point for format experiments
YAML format needs redesign: less code-snippet embedding, more declarative descriptions
next_actions: Switch from direct mechanical translation to LLM agent (ccb) for code generation
Redesign YAML format to be more declarative (L0-L1 target)
Focus on T01 Settings and T02 Headers as initial targets
Use proper BSV parsing library or manually write YAML for complex modules
Implement the full compiler pipeline: read YAML → merge knowledge → call ccb → compile → test
